charter: Integrate GSD 5-step workflow (Discuss→Plan→Execute→Verify→Ship) into agentXchain protocol and all templates
acceptance_contract: Protocol phase system in cli/src/lib/ supports GSD phases (Discuss/Plan/Execute/Verify/Ship) alongside existing phases
All templates scaffold GSD artifacts (CONTEXT.md/RESEARCH.md/PLAN.md/SUMMARY.md/VERIFICATION.md/UAT.md) per task
Role prompts enforce GSD discipline — each phase produces its required artifacts before advancing
Fresh sub-agent context isolation per task prevents cross-task contamination
PLAN.md uses structured XML format per GSD spec
Verification and UAT gates enforce evidence-backed ship decisions
